description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was slowing to a gradual stop on eastbound Folsom St. for a red light at 7th St. when it was rear-ended by 
vehicle 2 at approximately 10 mph. There was minor damage, no reported injuries, and police were not called.
